scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --workspace backend run dev" "npm --workspace frontend run dev"
scripts.stabilize: npm install && npm run rw-install && npx prisma generate --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm run rw-install && npm run rw-setup
scripts.rw-install: npm --workspace backend install && npm --workspace frontend install
